context: User wants to add a custom tool to OpenCode that the AI can invoke.

checklist.name: Tool registered via tool key (not client.registerTool)
checklist.description: Plugin uses `tool: { 'jira-lookup': tool({...}) }` in returned hooks, NOT `client.registerTool()`

checklist.name: Uses tool.schema for argument validation
checklist.description: Uses `tool.schema.string()` (or Zod equivalent) for the ticket_id argument

checklist.name: Schema field has .describe()
checklist.description: The ticket_id schema field includes a `.describe()` call

checklist.name: Execute returns string
checklist.description: The execute function returns a string value
